empty.pickOne: Pick a capture to see the transcript.
empty.pressShortcut: Press the shortcut anywhere on your machine to start your first capture.
empty.turnOnShortcut: Turn on the global shortcut to dictate from anywhere — or click Dictate above for an in-app capture.

deleteDialog.title: Delete capture
deleteDialog.description: This will permanently delete the capture, its audio, and its transcript. This cannot be undone.

toast.noVoiceDescription: Create a voice profile before using Play as.
toast.shortcutNotArmed: Shortcut on, but not yet armed
toast.shortcutNotArmedDescription_one: {{names}} still needs to download. Open the Captures tab to start.
toast.shortcutNotArmedDescription_other: {{names}} still need to download. Open the Captures tab to start.

chord.unsupported: "{{key}}" isn't supported in chords. Try a modifier or letter key.

readiness.title: A few things before you can dictate
readiness.subheading: The shortcut stays off until everything below is ready.
readiness.downloadStartedDescription: {{name}} is downloading. The shortcut will arm itself when it finishes.

stt.label: {{name}} (speech-to-text)
stt.configureMicrosoft: Set the Microsoft STT endpoint and key in the server environment.

llm.label: {{name}} (refinement)
llm.missing: Cleans up the raw transcript before paste
llm.missingWithSize: Cleans up the raw transcript before paste · {{size}}

inputMonitoring.label: Input Monitoring permission
inputMonitoring.ready: macOS allows Voicebox to detect your global shortcut.
inputMonitoring.missing: macOS needs to allow Voicebox to detect the global shortcut.

accessibility.label: Accessibility permission
accessibility.ready: Voicebox can paste transcriptions into other apps.
accessibility.missing: Required so transcriptions can paste into the focused app.

accessibility.title: Grant Accessibility permission to enable auto-paste
accessibility.body: Voicebox needs <path>System Settings → Privacy & Security → Accessibility</path> to paste transcriptions into other apps. Your dictation still lands in the Captures tab without it.
accessibility.stillMissing: Still not detected. macOS usually requires quitting and reopening Voicebox after toggling the permission.

inputMonitoring.title: Grant Input Monitoring to enable the global shortcut
inputMonitoring.body: Voicebox needs <path>System Settings → Privacy & Security → Input Monitoring</path> to detect your dictation chord. The toggle is on, but macOS is blocking key events until you allow it.
inputMonitoring.stillMissing: Still not detected. macOS usually requires quitting and reopening Voicebox after toggling the permission.

voiceInspector.defaultEffectsHint: Applied automatically to new generations with this voice.

toast.invalidImageFormat: Please select PNG, JPG, or WebP

empty.message: No audio channels yet. Create your first channel to route voices to specific devices.

devices.title: Available Devices
devices.defaultNote: Default channel uses system default device
devices.toggleHint: Click devices to add or remove them from the selected channel
devices.selectHint: Select a channel to assign devices

createDialog.title: Create Audio Channel
createDialog.description: Create a new audio channel (bus) to route voices to specific output devices.

editDialog.title: Edit Channel
editDialog.description: Update channel settings and voice assignments.

profileForm.createDescription: Create a new voice profile from an audio sample or a built-in voice.
profileForm.editDescription: Update your voice profile details and manage samples.

builtin.hint: Choose a pre-built voice. These don't require an audio sample.
builtin.note: This profile uses a built-in voice. The voice cannot be changed after creation.

fields.name: Name
fields.referenceTextPlaceholder: Enter the exact text spoken in the audio…
fields.defaultEngineHint: Auto-selects this engine when the profile is chosen.
fields.defaultEffectsHint: Effects applied automatically to all new generations with this voice.
fields.personalityPlaceholder: e.g. "a grumpy pirate who only speaks in nautical metaphors"
fields.personalityHint: Who this voice is and how they talk. Drives the Compose button and the in-character rewrite toggle on the generate page. Leave blank to hide both.

validation.referenceRequired: Reference text is required when adding a sample
validation.audioTooLong: Audio is too long ({{duration}}). Maximum duration is {{max}}.
validation.audioFailed: Failed to validate audio file. Please try a different file.

toast.noFileDescription: Please select an audio file first.
toast.invalidImageFormat: Please select an image file (PNG, JPG, or WebP)
toast.avatarRemovedDescription: Avatar image has been removed successfully.
toast.profileCreatedBuiltin: "{{name}}" has been created with a built-in voice.
toast.profileCreatedSample: "{{name}}" has been created with a sample.
toast.sampleRequiredDescription: Please provide an audio sample to create the voice profile.
toast.referenceTextRequiredDescription: Please provide the reference text for the audio sample.
toast.invalidAudioDescription: Audio duration is {{duration}}, but maximum is {{max}}.
toast.rollbackFailedDescription: Created profile could not be removed after sample upload failure.
toast.sampleFailedRolledBack: Failed to add sample. The profile was rolled back.

audioSample.uploadHint: Click to choose a file or drag and drop. Maximum duration: 30 seconds.
audioSample.recordHint: Click to start recording. Maximum duration: 30 seconds.
audioSample.systemHint: Capture audio from your system. Maximum duration: 30 seconds.

empty.title: No samples yet
empty.hint: Add your first audio sample to get started

sampleList.note: Note: A single 30-second sample is the sweet spot. Quality may decrease with multiple samples. In a future update samples might be interchangeable and tagged for varying styles of the same voice.

deleteDialog.title: Delete Sample
deleteDialog.description: Are you sure you want to delete this audio sample? This action cannot be undone.

toast.updatedDescription: Reference text has been updated successfully.

list.empty: No voice profiles yet. Create your first profile to get started.
list.unsupportedNote: Only supported voice profiles can be selected for the current model.

deleteDialog.title: Delete Profile
deleteDialog.body: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

effects.title: Effects
effects.placeholder: Select a preset or create a new one

unsaved.title: Unsaved Preset
unsaved.hint: Configure effects in the panel on the right.

preview.label: Preview
preview.hint: Preview applies effects to the clean version without saving.

saveAs.title: Save as Custom Preset
saveAs.description: Create a new custom preset based on the current effects chain.

Robotic.name: Robotic
Robotic.description: Metallic robotic voice (flanger with slow LFO and high feedback)

Radio.name: Radio
Radio.description: Thin AM-radio voice with band-pass filtering and light compression

empty.title: No stories yet
empty.hint: Create your first story to get started

createDialog.title: Create New Story
createDialog.description: Create a new story to organize your voice generations into conversations.

editDialog.title: Edit Story
editDialog.description: Update the story name and description.

deleteDialog.title: Are you sure?
deleteDialog.description: This will permanently delete the story and all its items. This action cannot be undone.

selectStory.title: Select a story
selectStory.hint: Choose a story from the list to view its content

notFound.title: Story not found
notFound.hint: The selected story could not be loaded

empty.title: No items in this story
empty.hint: Generate speech using the box below to add items

deleteDialog.title: Delete Generation
deleteDialog.body: Are you sure you want to delete this generation from "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

clearFailedDialog.title: Clear failed generations
clearFailedDialog.body_one: This will permanently delete {{count}} failed generation from your history. This cannot be undone.
clearFailedDialog.body_other: This will permanently delete {{count}} failed generations from your history. This cannot be undone.

importDialog.title: Import Generation
importDialog.body: Import the generation from "{{name}}". This will add it to your history.

effectsDialog.title: Apply Effects
effectsDialog.body: Configure post-processing effects to apply to this generation. A new version will be created.

instruct.placeholder: Delivery instructions — e.g. Speak slowly with warmth, Authoritative and clear…

compose.failedDescription: Could not generate text from this personality.

import.dialogDescription: Import the profile from "{{name}}". This will create a new profile with all samples.

language.label: Language
language.description: Choose the display language for Voicebox.

theme.label: Theme
theme.description: Match your system, or pick a fixed light or dark appearance.

serverUrl.title: Server URL
serverUrl.description: The address of your voicebox backend server.

keepServerRunning.title: Keep server running when app closes
keepServerRunning.description: The server will continue running in the background after closing the app.
keepServerRunning.failedDescription: Could not sync setting to backend.
keepServerRunning.runningDescription: Server will continue running when app closes
keepServerRunning.stoppedDescription: Server will stop when app closes

networkAccess.title: Allow network access
networkAccess.description: Makes the server accessible from other devices on your network. Restart the app after changing.
networkAccess.enabled: Network access enabled. Restart the app to apply.
networkAccess.disabled: Network access disabled. Restart the app to apply.

devMode.title: Development mode
devMode.description: Auto-updates are disabled in development mode.

download.title: Update to {{version}}
download.description: Download and install the latest version.

ready.title: Update ready to install
ready.description: Version {{version}} has been downloaded. Restart to complete.

api.title: API Access
api.description: Integrate Voicebox into your workflow via the REST API at {{url}}

generation.title: Generation
generation.description: Controls for long text generation. These settings apply to all engines.

chunkLimit.title: Auto-chunking limit
chunkLimit.description: Long text is split into chunks at sentence boundaries. Lower values can improve quality for long outputs.

crossfade.title: Chunk crossfade
crossfade.description: Blends audio between chunks to smooth transitions. Set to 0 for a hard cut.

normalize.title: Normalize audio
normalize.description: Adjusts output volume to a consistent level across generations.

autoplay.title: Autoplay on generate
autoplay.description: Automatically play audio when a generation completes.

folder.title: Generations folder
folder.description: Where generated audio files are stored on disk.

sidebar.aboutBody: Clone a voice from a short sample, then generate speech in any voice across any language. Ship TTS into AI agents, games, podcasts, or long-form narration.

clone.title: Clone any voice in seconds.
clone.body: A few seconds of reference audio is enough. Multi-sample support for higher quality when you want it.

engines.title: Seven engines, 23 languages.
engines.body: Pick the tradeoff that fits — quality, speed, or multilingual coverage.

agentReady.title: Agent-ready.
agentReady.body: REST API with per-profile control — give any AI a voice you've cloned.

dictation.title: Dictation
dictation.description: Capture from anywhere on your machine with a global shortcut.

globalShortcut.title: Global shortcut
globalShortcut.description: Hold the shortcut to record from anywhere on your machine. Release to transcribe.

pushToTalk.title: Push-to-talk shortcut
pushToTalk.description: Hold these keys anywhere on your system to record. Release to stop and transcribe.

toggle.title: Toggle shortcut
toggle.description: Press once to start a hands-free recording. Press again to stop. Usually push-to-talk plus Space.

chordPicker.pttDescription: Hold the keys you want to use, then release and click Save. The right-hand modifier badge shows whether a key is the left or right variant.
chordPicker.toggleDescription: Hold the keys you want to use, then release and click Save. Pick something distinct from your push-to-talk chord.

preview.title: Preview
preview.description: What appears on screen while you're holding the shortcut.

copyToClipboard.title: Copy transcript to clipboard
copyToClipboard.description: The cleaned transcript lands on your clipboard when the capture finishes.

autoPaste.title: Auto-paste into focused text field
autoPaste.description: If a text input is focused in another app, paste directly into it. Voicebox saves and restores whatever was on your clipboard.

transcription.title: Transcription
transcription.description: Pick which speech-to-text model runs on your captures.

model.title: Transcription model
model.description: Use local Whisper or Microsoft Speech to Text for faster cloud transcription.
model.microsoft: Microsoft Speech to Text · Azure cloud

language.title: Language
language.description: Auto-detect works for most captures. Lock it if you're always speaking the same language.

archive.title: Archive audio
archive.description: Keep the original recording alongside every transcript.

refinement.title: Refinement
refinement.description: Optionally run a local LLM over transcripts to clean filler words, punctuation, and self-corrections.

auto.title: Refine transcripts automatically
auto.description: Runs after every capture. You can still toggle between raw and refined in the Captures tab.

model.title: Refinement model
model.description: Larger models are slower but handle subtle self-corrections and technical vocabulary better.

smartCleanup.title: Smart cleanup
smartCleanup.description: Remove filler words (um, uh, like), restore punctuation, and fix capitalization without rephrasing.

selfCorrection.title: Remove self-corrections
selfCorrection.description: When you change your mind mid-sentence ("actually, no...", "wait, I meant..."), drop the retracted part and keep the final intent.

preserveTechnical.title: Preserve technical terms
preserveTechnical.description: Keep code identifiers, command names, and acronyms exactly as spoken. Turn on when you dictate into a code prompt.

playback.title: Playback
playback.description: Default voice for the "Play as" action in the Captures tab.

defaultVoice.title: Default voice
defaultVoice.description: Used when you click Play as without picking a voice first. You can change it per capture.

storage.title: Storage
storage.description: Captures are saved as paired audio and transcript files in your Voicebox data directory.

retention.title: Retention
retention.description: How long to keep captures. Applies to both audio and transcripts.

folder.title: Captures folder
folder.description: Where capture audio and transcripts are stored on disk.

sidebar.aboutBody: Hold a shortcut anywhere on your machine, speak, and Voicebox turns your voice into text. Replay it in any cloned voice, paste it into any app, or pipe it into your coding agent.

local.title: Fully local.
local.body: Local Whisper and local refinement keep audio on your hardware. Cloud STT sends capture audio to the selected provider.

playAs.title: Play as any voice.
playAs.body: Transcripts can be read back in any profile you've cloned.

crossPlatform.title: Cross-platform.
crossPlatform.body: Same shortcut, same flow on macOS, Windows, and Linux.

windowsCaveat.title: Heads-up on Windows
windowsCaveat.body: The shortcut won't fire while Voicebox itself or any app running as administrator is focused. Working on it.

install.title: Install into your agent
install.description: Voicebox exposes a local MCP server whenever the app is open. Paste one of these snippets into your agent's MCP config.

http.title: HTTP (recommended)
http.description: For clients that speak HTTP MCP — Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, VS Code.

claudeCode.title: Claude Code one-liner
claudeCode.description: Registers via the Claude Code CLI.

stdio.title: Stdio (fallback)
stdio.description: For clients that only spawn stdio processes. The shim binary ships with the app.

defaultVoice.title: Default voice
defaultVoice.description: Used when an agent calls voicebox.speak without a specific profile and has no per-client binding.
defaultVoice.label: Default playback voice
defaultVoice.labelHint: Shared with the Captures-tab 'Play as voice' dropdown — one default voice for passive playback.

bindings.title: Per-agent voice
bindings.description: Bind specific agents to specific voices so you can tell who's speaking without looking. The agent identifies itself by the X-Voicebox-Client-Id header (or VOICEBOX_CLIENT_ID env for stdio).
bindings.empty: No bindings yet. Add one below, then configure your MCP client to send the matching X-Voicebox-Client-Id.

sidebar.aboutBody: Model Context Protocol lets your AI coding agent — Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf — call Voicebox tools. Speak in a cloned voice, transcribe audio, browse captures.

tools.speak: Speak text in a voice profile.

sidebar.postSpeak: Also exposed as POST /speak for shell scripts, ACP, A2A.

cuda.title: CUDA Backend
cuda.description: NVIDIA GPU acceleration via a downloadable CUDA backend.

download.title: Download CUDA backend
download.description: ~2.4 GB download. Requires an NVIDIA GPU with CUDA support.

switchToCuda.title: Switch to CUDA backend
switchToCuda.description: CUDA backend is downloaded and ready. Restart to enable.

switchToCpu.title: Switch to CPU backend
switchToCpu.description: Disable GPU acceleration. You can re-download CUDA later.

remove.title: Remove CUDA backend
remove.description: Delete the downloaded CUDA binary to free disk space.

gpu.footer: Voicebox automatically detects and uses the best available GPU on your system. On Apple Silicon Macs, the MLX backend runs natively on the Neural Engine and GPU via Metal Performance Shaders (MPS), with no additional setup required. On Windows and Linux with NVIDIA GPUs, you can download an optional CUDA backend for hardware-accelerated inference. AMD ROCm, Intel XPU, and DirectML are also supported where available through PyTorch. When no GPU is detected, Voicebox falls back to CPU — all engines still work, just slower.

logs.title: Server Logs
logs.devHint: Server logs are only captured when the app manages the server process (production builds).

about.tagline: The open-source voice synthesis studio. Clone voices, generate speech, apply effects, and build voice-powered apps — all running locally on your machine.

models.title: Models
models.subtitle: Download and manage AI models for voice generation and transcription

problems.title: Problems
problems.noDetails: No error details available. Try downloading again.

deleteDialog.title: Delete Model
deleteDialog.body: Are you sure you want to delete {{name}}?
deleteDialog.sizeNote: This will free up {{size}} of disk space. The model will need to be re-downloaded if you want to use it again.

migrateDialog.title: Move models to new location?
migrateDialog.description: The server will shut down while models are being moved to the new folder. It will restart automatically once the migration is complete.

migrate.title: Moving models
migrate.offline: The server is offline while models are being moved.

toast.cancelFailedDescription: Could not cancel the download task.
toast.resetToDefault: Reset to default location. Restarting server…
toast.noModelsToMigrateDescription: Download at least one model before changing the storage location.
